# Page 3 Results and Conclusions

# Resources & Inspirations 

This project utilized resources primarily from two academic papers. If you are interested in anything you see on this dashboard look into the two papers cited below.

1. Cabrales-Orona G, et al. (2026). Grain amaranth genes coding for an RNA-binding and a small, unknown function protein, respectively, enhance thermotolerance when overexpressed in Arabidopsis thaliana. Physiol Mol Biol Plants, 32(1):59–80. PMID: 41675614
  1.2 The dataset used in the paper:
  NCBI Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO), accession GSE277320. https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE277320

2. Chen Y, Lun AT, Smyth GK. From reads to genes to pathways: differential expression analysis of RNA-Seq experiments using Rsubread and the edgeR quasi-likelihood pipeline. F1000Res. 2016 Jun 20;5:1438. doi: 10.12688/f1000research.8987.2. PMID: 27508061; PMCID: PMC4934518.
